name: Music Box Theatre
notes: Independent, operating since 1929. PROBED 2026-07-05: the "JavaScript required" wall is a Sucuri Cloudproxy bot challenge (HTTP 307 + obfuscated cookie-setting JS) in front of the ENTIRE site, not an SPA quirk — so no JSON/XHR endpoint is reachable without the challenge cookie either. Underlying CMS is Drupal (stock robots.txt, which allows crawling). /rss.xml bypasses the challenge but is EMPTY; /events/feed and /films.json are 404. Conclusion: use Playwright (fetch_method: headless) — a real browser passes the challenge like any visitor; keep our honest bot UA, run at low frequency (~daily), and try /calendar month view first. Coords are approximate — confirm before relying on the distance filter.

name: Gene Siskel Film Center
notes: Nonprofit, part of the School of the Art Institute of Chicago. Verify address (State St.), listings_url, and ticketing platform.

name: Kan-Kan Cinema & Bar
notes: Operated by Indianapolis Film Project, Inc. (501c3). WordPress site that SERVER-RENDERS listings — requests + BeautifulSoup works, no headless needed. Events at /events/{slug}/. Checkout hands off to Elevent (goelevent.com/Kan-KanCinemaandBrasserie). EASY archetype; Elevent backs other Midwest venues so this adapter should amortize — check for an Elevent JSON search endpoint before hard-parsing HTML.
